## 2️⃣OLD: Day 2 Training – Opening/Mid-Shift

---

### 💡**Objective & Overview**

### **![mega emoji][image119] Welcome to Day 2 of Training\!**

Building on what you learned on your first day, today’s training will focus on deepening your menu knowledge, refining your service skills, and introducing you to upselling techniques. This checklist will guide you through these essential tasks, helping you become more confident and competent in your role as a server. Each item on the checklist is designed to enhance your understanding and practical abilities, ensuring that you’re ready to provide excellent service to our guests. Engage fully with each task, and don’t hesitate to seek clarification if needed. Let’s continue building on your foundation and make the most of today’s training\!

---

![pushpin emoji][image120] **Objective:** Deepening Menu Knowledge, Practicing Service Skills, & Upselling Techniques

![bulb emoji][image121]**Overview:** Today will focus on deepening your understanding of our menu and practicing your service skills. Engage in role-playing scenarios to develop your upselling techniques and get more hands-on practice in a live service environment.

### 📋**Opening Checklist**

Arrive promptly, clock in, and begin working with your trainer. Perform the opening checklist using the Jolt app with your trainer's guidance.

* Following the opening procedures ensures the restaurant is set up for success and ready for guests as soon as service begins.

### 📝**Steps of Service Review**

Detailed walkthrough of the entire service sequence from greeting to farewell; practice proper table approach, order-taking, and check presentation

Dial in on each step, keep it consistent, and elevate the guest experience every time. **Use this visual guide to stay sharp and execute flawlessly.**

### 🆘**Trainer Support**

Practice taking orders, answering questions, and handling special requests. Learn to manage multiple tables and maintain service efficiency. Hands-on practice in clearing tables, resetting for new guests, and ensuring a clean environment

* Taking on more responsibilities under your trainer’s guidance builds your confidence and ensures you’re prepared for independent service.

### 📖**Menu Training**

Learn the details about key menu items, popular dishes, special ingredients, allergies and dietary options. This varies per location.

* Deepening your menu knowledge allows you to make more informed recommendations and handle guest inquiries with ease.

### 🥜**Review of Food Allergies**

Learn about the most common food allergies, including nuts, dairy, gluten, shellfish, soy, and eggs. Understand the potential severity of allergic reactions and the importance of avoiding cross-contamination

* Understanding common food allergies and the importance of avoiding cross-contamination is crucial for guest safety.

### 🥦**Review of Dietary Options**

Understand different dietary restrictions such as vegetarian, vegan, gluten-free, and keto. Familiarize yourself with the menu options that cater to these dietary needs

* Familiarizing yourself with dietary options ensures you can cater to a wide range of guest preferences and needs.

### 🍷**Beverage Service**

Overview of our full bar offerings (liquor, beer, wine, and signature cocktails); proper serving techniques for different types of drinks; age verification procedures and responsible alcohol service

* Knowing how to properly serve drinks and understanding responsible alcohol service is essential for maintaining a professional and safe dining environment.

### 👔**Table Management**

Techniques for managing multiple tables efficiently; prioritizing tasks and time management

* Learning to manage multiple tables efficiently is key to maintaining a smooth flow of service during busy periods.

### 🤝**Teamwork and Communication**

Importance of pre-shift meetings and ongoing communication; collaborating with kitchen staff, bartenders, and other servers

* Effective communication with your team ensures that service runs smoothly and guests receive the best possible experience.

### 💸**Upselling Techniques**

Introduction to upselling strategies for increasing check averages by suggesting additional items, promotions, or upgrades. Practice upselling techniques with your trainer and peers through simulated scenarios

* Practicing upselling techniques helps increase check averages while enhancing the guest experience by suggesting complementary items.

### 🥂**Service Skills Practice**

Continue observing your trainer and gradually take more responsibility. Bring water to tables, run food, and use the POS system under your trainer's supervision.

* Hands-on practice with serving tasks builds your skills and prepares you for real-world service scenarios.

### 💻**Toast POS Practice**

Advanced Toast POS System functions, including split checks, managing tabs, and handling special requests. Practice transactions and troubleshooting common issues.

* Advanced POS practice helps you handle complex transactions and special requests efficiently.

---

### 💡**Objective & Overview**

### **![mega emoji][image129] Welcome to Day 3 of Training\!**

Today’s training is all about mastering your menu knowledge, handling special requests, and navigating complex service scenarios. This checklist will guide you through cross-training sessions and other tasks designed to give you a well-rounded view of how each role contributes to a smooth operation. As you work through the checklist, focus on honing your ability to provide exceptional service, even in challenging situations. Each task is an opportunity to demonstrate your growing expertise and build your confidence as a server. Let’s aim for mastery today and make sure you’re prepared for any scenario\!

---

![pushpin emoji][image130] **Objective:** Mastery Menu Knowledge, Special Requests, Handling Complex Scenarios, & Cross-Training

![bulb emoji][image131]**Overview:** You will engage in a cross-training session with staff to give you a well-rounded view of how each role contributes to a smooth operation. After completing your cross-training session at expo, focus on becoming an expert on our menu offerings and crafting your ability to enhance guest experiences through thoughtful recommendations and upselling. Learn advanced service skills, including handling complex guest situations, common rebuttals, and managing service during high-volume periods.

### 👩‍🏫**Independent Service Practice**

Arrive promptly, clock in, and begin working with your trainer. Lead with your tables while your trainer handles larger parties. Observe and learn from their handling of larger groups

* Taking the lead on your tables while observing your trainer handle larger parties gives you practical experience and confidence in managing your own sections.

### 📚**Comprehensive Menu Training**

Detailed review of all menu items, including ingredients and preparation methods; identifying common allergens and dietary restrictions; tasting session of key menu items

* A deep understanding of the menu, including ingredients and preparation methods, ensures you can confidently recommend dishes and accommodate guest preferences.

### 🍹**Beverage Menu Deep Dive**

Review with your trainer detailed Exploration of Signature Cocktails, Beer Selection, and Wine List (location varies depending on product offerings)

Understanding flavor profiles and mastering the principles of pairing, takes your comprehension to an advanced knowledge base level which you will develop in time.

* Developing a thorough knowledge of the beverage offerings allows you to make expert drink recommendations and pairings.

### 🦾**Advanced Service Techniques**

Learn strategies for addressing guest complaints and resolving issues effectively. Techniques for staying organized and maintaining service quality during busy periods

* Learning advanced techniques for handling guest complaints and staying organized during busy periods prepares you for challenging service situations.

### 🧠**Complex Service Scenarios**

Practice handling complex guest situations, including difficult interactions and high-stress environments through role-playing. Develop strategies for resolving conflicts and managing service challenges

* Practicing difficult service scenarios through role-playing helps you develop strategies for resolving conflicts and managing high-stress environments.

### 🙏**Handling Special Requests**

Accommodating dietary restrictions and allergies; customizing orders to meet guest preferences

* Knowing how to accommodate special requests, including dietary restrictions and allergies, ensures a personalized and safe dining experience for guests.

### 👉**Cross-Training Expo Session \#1**

## **Introduction:**

**{2 hours}** During your shift, your manager will have you shadow the expo line in the kitchen, giving you firsthand experience in how the venue operates and assisting with running food. This will provide you with a well-rounded understanding of each role, familiarize you with our menu and table numbers, and ensure you learn our high standards of service and hospitality.

| ![dart emoji][image132] Objective: Introduction to Expo Training and Demonstrate Readiness for Independent Work |
| :---- |

| ![bulb emoji][image133] Spotlight: In this segment, you will focus on mastering the expo role. You must develop a thorough understanding of how to efficiently coordinate between the kitchen and the dining area. This session aims to solidify your grasp of expo responsibilities. You will need to demonstrate your readiness to work independently. By the end of this segment, you should be confident and proficient in all aspects of front-of-house duties. The ultimate goal is to ensure you understand how the restaurant and back-of-house operations function seamlessly. |
| :---- |

---

## ![white\_check\_mark emoji][image134] **Trainee Tasks:**

* **Expo Station Setup:** Get with the current expo on duty or manager on duty and work with them throughout this training session. Review the items stocked for the dinner shift and ensure everything is set up for your shift with backup items ready to go as well.  
* **Expediting Food Orders:** Expedite food tickets with a trainer or manager. Run food to tables according to the printed tickets.  
* **Understanding the Expo Role:** Learn the responsibilities of the expo position, including organizing and coordinating food orders, communicating with the kitchen staff, and ensuring order accuracy.  
* **Station Cleanliness:** Keep the station clean throughout the shift using sanitizer solution, sanitizer wipes, gloves, and rags.  
* **Expo Station Setup Recap:** Review the proper setup of the expo station, including organizing tickets, garnishes, condiments, and necessary utensils.  
* **Order Coordination:** Practice coordinating orders between the kitchen and the serving staff. Ensure that each dish is prepared to the correct specifications and that all components of the order are complete before sending it out.  
* **Quality Control:** Understand the importance of quality control. Check each plate for presentation, temperature, and accuracy before it leaves the kitchen.  
* **Timing and Efficiency:** Learn techniques for managing the timing of orders, especially during peak service times. Ensure that hot foods remain hot and cold foods remain cold.  
* **Communication Skills:** Enhance your communication skills to efficiently relay information between the kitchen staff and servers. Practice clear and concise communication to avoid misunderstandings.  
* **Handling Special Requests:** Learn how to handle special requests and modifications efficiently. Ensure that all dietary restrictions and allergies are communicated clearly to the kitchen staff.

| Once you've completed your first Cross-Training Expo Session, please find your assigned trainer for the remainder of your shift. |
| :---- |

### ❓**Product Assessment Questionnaire**

{end of shift \~ 10min}

Engage in an interactive Ad-lib questionnaire on the most common menu items with your trainer.

* Testing your knowledge of menu items with your trainer helps ensure that you’re retaining essential information and are prepared for service.

### 🔄**Ending Shift Checklist**

Perform the mid/closing checklist using the Jolt app. Review all areas of the closing checklist to become familiar with them.

* Completing the mid/closing checklist ensures that all tasks are finished properly, setting the restaurant up for success in the next shift.

### 📝**Closing Reports**

Using the POS system, run the server shift review and print it for the manager. Staple credit slips to the shift review, leave it on the manager’s desk, and inform the manager you are done. Verify if any other tasks need to be completed.

* Learning how to run and organize shift reports ensures that all financial transactions are accurate and properly documented.

As we conclude today’s session, use this checklist to assess your progress and ensure that you’ve mastered the essential skills covered. Reflect on how you handled special requests, complex scenarios, and your ability to upsell effectively. Completing this checklist will help you identify any areas that need more practice, ensuring that you’re ready to tackle the next phase of your training. Let’s wrap up today’s learning with a focus on growth and preparation for tomorrow’s challenges\!

---

## ![heavy\_check\_mark emoji][image136] **Day 3 Checklist:**

* 1\. Independent Service Practice  
* 2\. Comprehensive Menu Training  
* 3\. Beverage Menu Deep Dive  
* 4\. Advanced Service Techniques  
* 5\. Complex Service Scenarios  
* 6\. Handling Special Requests  
* 7\. Cross-Training Expo Session \#1:  
* 8\. Product Assessment Questionnaire  
* 9\. Closing Checklist  
* 10\. Closing Reports  
* 11\. Shift Wrap-up

---

## ![dart emoji][image137] **Performance Targets:**

* Did you deepen your menu knowledge and practice making thoughtful recommendations?  
* Were you able to handle special requests and dietary restrictions effectively?  
* Did you practice managing complex guest interactions and scenarios?  
* Have you completed your cross-training session and feel more integrated with the team?  
* Do you feel confident in the skills and techniques covered today?

#### ![point\_right emoji][image138] **Do you feel confident that all targets were hit?**

### **DAY 3 KNOWLEDGE CHECK ![arrow\_down emoji][image141]**

## 4️⃣OLD: Day 4 Training – Closing Shift

---

### 💡**Objective & Overview**

### **![mega emoji][image142] Welcome to Day 4 of Training\!**

As you continue to refine your skills as a server, today’s training will focus on guest interaction, personalized service, and handling challenging situations. This checklist will guide you through essential tasks that will help you build strong relationships with guests and provide exceptional service. You’ll also complete your final cross-training session, which will enhance your understanding of how the entire team works together. Each task is designed to boost your confidence and competence, ensuring that you’re fully prepared for any situation. Let’s aim to exceed guest expectations and make today’s training a success\!

---

![pushpin emoji][image143] **Objective:** Cross-Training, Guest Relation Skills, Personalized Service, & Challenging Situations

![bulb emoji][image144]**Overview**: Before we dive into today's bartending training session, you'll finish your second and final cross-training expo session, which will last one hour. Start by connecting with your assigned trainer or the MOD to get started. Today, you will refine your guest interaction skills to ensure every guest feels valued and heard. We will focus on techniques for providing personalized service, actively listening, and effectively resolving any issues that may arise. This training will equip you with the confidence and competence to handle a variety of guest scenarios, from routine inquiries to complex complaints, ensuring a positive dining experience for all our patrons.

### 👉**Cross-Training Session \#2**

## **![arrows\_counterclockwise emoji][image145] Recap and Reinforcement of Key Topics**

| ![dart emoji][image146] Objective: Reinforce Key Concepts and Ensure Understanding |
| :---- |

| ![bulb emoji][image147] Spotlight: The focus of this segment is to recap and reinforce key topics covered in the previous sessions. The goal is to ensure you have a solid understanding of the core responsibilities and skills required for the expo role. This session will involve reviewing crucial tasks, answering any questions, and providing additional practice where necessary. |
| :---- |

---

## ![white\_check\_mark emoji][image148] **Trainee Tasks:**

* **Expo Station Setup Recap:** Review the process of setting up the expo station. Discuss any challenges faced during the previous session and how to overcome them.  
* **Expediting Food Orders Recap:** Reflect on the experience of expediting food orders from the previous session. Discuss what went well and what could be improved.  
* **Understanding the Expo Role Recap:** Revisit the responsibilities of the expo position, focusing on coordination and communication with the kitchen staff.  
* **Station Cleanliness Recap:** Review the importance of maintaining a clean and organized station. Discuss techniques and best practices for keeping the station sanitary.  
* **Order Coordination Recap:** Reflect on the coordination of orders between the kitchen and serving staff. Identify any difficulties and discuss solutions.  
* **Quality Control Recap:** Review the importance of quality control. Discuss any instances where quality control was a challenge and how to address them.  
* **Timing and Efficiency Recap:** Reflect on managing the timing of orders, especially during peak times. Discuss any timing issues and how to improve efficiency.  
* **Communication Skills Recap:** Review the importance of clear and concise communication. Discuss any communication issues faced and how to improve.  
* **Handling Special Requests Recap:** Reflect on handling special requests and modifications. Discuss any challenges faced and how to improve accuracy.  
* **Final Review and Wrap-Up:** Summarize the key learnings from the session. Discuss any remaining questions or concerns with the trainer or MOD.

| Once you've completed the final Cross-Training Expo Session, please find your assigned trainer for the remainder of your shift. |
| :---- |

### 📋**Mid-Shift Tasks**

Begin working with your trainer through operational procedures and server tasks after completing your cross-training expo session

* Working alongside your trainer through operational tasks gives you hands-on experience and builds your confidence in managing your responsibilities.

### 🌟**Exceeding Guest Expectations**

Techniques for personalizing guest experiences; anticipating guest needs and proactive service

* Personalizing service and anticipating guest needs are key to providing an exceptional dining experience that encourages repeat business.

### 🗣️**Active Listening and Communication Skills**

Improving verbal and non-verbal communication; techniques for effective listening and responding to guest cues

* Developing strong communication skills helps you understand and respond to guest cues effectively, improving overall service quality.

### ⚠️**Handling Complaints and Difficult Situations**

Step-by-step process for resolving guest complaints; de-escalation techniques for challenging interactions; when and how to involve management

* Knowing how to resolve guest complaints calmly and professionally ensures that any issues are handled smoothly, maintaining a positive atmosphere.

### 🎉**Special Occasions and Large Party Service**

Handling reservations and special requests; serving techniques for large groups. Review of 6-item rule for kitchen and bar service

* Understanding how to handle reservations and large parties ensures that these groups receive attentive and efficient service.

### 🌎**Cultural Sensitivity and Diversity**

Understanding and respecting cultural differences; providing inclusive service to all guests

* Being aware of and respecting cultural differences helps you provide inclusive and respectful service to all guests.

### 🎭**Role-Playing Exercises**

Practice handling various guest scenarios, from complaints to special celebrations.

* Practicing different guest scenarios through role-playing helps you prepare for real-life challenges and develop effective service strategies.

### 📜**Review of Company Policies**

Revisit key policies related to guest interactions and problem-solving.

* Revisiting key policies related to guest interactions ensures that you’re fully prepared to handle various service situations in line with company standards.

### 🔐**Closing Checklist**

Complete the closing checklist using the Jolt app. Review and familiarize yourself with all areas of the checklist.

* Thoroughly completing the closing checklist ensures that the restaurant is clean, organized, and ready for the next day.

### 📝**Closing Reports**

Run the server shift review using the POS system, print it for the manager, attach credit slips, leave it on the manager’s desk, and confirm if any other tasks need attention.

* Accurately completing and submitting the closing report ensures that all financial and service details are accounted for at the end of your shift.

### ☑️**Shift Wrap-Up & Checklist**

## **![point\_right emoji][image149] End-of-Day 4 Training:**

As you complete today’s training, use this checklist to reflect on your performance and ensure that you’re mastering the skills needed to provide excellent service. Review your interactions with guests, your ability to personalize service, and how you handled any challenging situations. Completing this checklist will help you identify any areas for improvement and ensure that you’re ready for the final day of training. Let’s finish today strong and prepare for tomorrow with confidence\!

---

## ![heavy\_check\_mark emoji][image150] **Day 4 Checklist:**

* 1\. Trainee Topic: Cross-Training Expo Session \#2  
* 2\. Mid-Shift Tasks Checklist  
* 3\. Exceeding Guest Expectations  
* 4\. Active Listening and Communication Skills  
* 5\. Handling Complaints and Difficult Situations  
* 6\. Special Occasions and Large Party Service  
* 7\. Cultural Sensitivity and Diversity  
* 8\. Role-Playing Exercises  
* 9\. Review of Company Policies  
* 10\. Closing Checklist  
* 11\. Closing Report

---

## ![dart emoji][image151] **Performance Targets:**

* Did you complete your final cross-training session and feel confident in your role?  
* Were you able to provide personalized service and exceed guest expectations?  
* Did you handle challenging situations and guest complaints effectively?  
* Have you practiced and refined your communication skills with both guests and team members?  
* Do you feel ready to apply everything you’ve learned in a real shift?

#### ![point\_right emoji][image152] **Do you feel confident that all targets were hit?**

#### **![point\_right emoji][image153] Review any targets you may have missed.**

### **DAY 4 KNOWLEDGE CHECK ![arrow\_down emoji][image155]**

## 5️⃣OLD: Day 5 Training – Closing Shift

---

### 💡**Objective & Overview**

### **![mega emoji][image156] Welcome to Day 5 of Training\!**

You’ve reached the final day of your training, and today’s checklist is designed to help you demonstrate your readiness to perform independently. This is your opportunity to showcase everything you’ve learned, from service skills to upselling techniques, and to prepare for solo service. Each task is an opportunity to put your skills into practice and build your confidence as a server. Take pride in how far you’ve come, and use today to solidify your competence and readiness for your role. Let’s end your training on a strong and successful note\!

---

![pushpin emoji][image157] **Objective:** Integrated Learned Skills & Introductory to Solo Service

![bulb emoji][image158] **Overview:** Today is your opportunity to bring everything you've learned into practice. You will demonstrate your ability to provide exceptional service from start to finish in a simulated environment. This comprehensive run-through will help you solidify your skills, gain confidence, and ensure you are fully prepared for solo service. You will also have the chance to collaborate with coworkers, tackle advanced POS scenarios, and receive final feedback to fine-tune your performance before stepping into your role independently.

### 🏅**Comprehensive Service Run-Through**

Full simulation of service from start to finish, including multiple tables; practice all aspects from greeting to payment processing.

* Performing a full simulation of service allows you to practice and perfect your skills in a controlled environment, preparing you for real shifts.

### 💻**Advanced POS Scenarios**

Handling complex orders, voids, comps, and discounts in the Toast system; managing large party bills and split checks.

* Handling complex orders and transactions in the POS system ensures that you’re ready to manage any situation that arises during service.

### 🤝**Team Service Exercises**

Collaborating with other coworkers to provide seamless service; practicing hand-offs and table assists.

* Collaborating with coworkers in service exercises strengthens teamwork and helps you practice effective hand-offs and table assists.

### 📈**Personal Development Plan**

Setting goals for continuous improvement; introduction to ongoing training opportunities within Three Points Hospitality

* Setting goals for continuous improvement helps you focus on areas where you can grow and excel in your role.

### 👥**Shadowing Experienced Server**

Final observation shift with an experienced server; opportunity to ask any remaining questions

* Observing an experienced server during your final training shift gives you a last opportunity to ask questions and learn from their expertise.

### ☑️**Shift Wrap-Up & Checklist**

## **![point\_right emoji][image159] End-of-Day 5 Training:**

As you wrap up your final day of training, this checklist will help you review and reinforce everything you’ve learned. Reflect on the skills you’ve developed, the challenges you’ve overcome, and the progress you’ve made. Completing this checklist will ensure that you’re fully prepared to take on your role as a server with confidence. Congratulations on completing your training—let’s make sure you’re fully set up for success\!

---

## ![heavy\_check\_mark emoji][image160] **Day 5 Checklist:**

* 1\. Comprehensive Service Run-Through  
* 2\. Advanced POS Scenarios  
* 3\. Team Service Exercises  
* 4\. Personal Development Plan  
* 5\. Shadowing Experienced Server  
* 6\. Shift Wrap-Up

---

## ![dart emoji][image161] **Performance Targets:**

* Did you successfully complete a full service run-through, from greeting to payment?  
* Were you able to handle high-volume service and manage multiple tables effectively?  
* Did you refine your upselling techniques and customer interaction skills?  
* Have you demonstrated your readiness for solo service with confidence?  
* Are you prepared to take on your role independently and continue your growth?

#### ![point\_right emoji][image162] **Do you feel confident that all targets were hit?**

#### **![point\_right emoji][image163] Review any targets you may have missed.**
